Package com.shaft.pilot.agent

package com.shaft.pilot.agent
  • Class
    Description
    LocalAgentClient
    Supported local agent frontends for SHAFT Autobot routing.
    LocalAgentMode
    SHAFT Autobot interaction mode.
    LocalAgentProcessResult
    Raw process execution result from a local agent CLI.
    LocalAgentProcessRunner
    Executes a local agent command.
    LocalAgentRequest
    Immutable local agent execution request.
    LocalAgentRequest.Builder
    Fluent builder for LocalAgentRequest.
    LocalAgentResponse
    Safe local agent execution response.
    LocalAgentService
    Routes SHAFT Autobot requests to local agent CLIs.
    LocalAgentStatus
    Normalized local agent execution outcome.
